## Parent
Reference: PORTFOLIO_V2_PRD.md

## What to build
Apply final styling polish, micro-interactions, and fix any remaining bugs or inconsistencies across the portfolio website.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Visual polish:
  - Consistent spacing and alignment
  - Refined typography (line heights, letter spacing)
  - Enhanced shadows and borders
  - Gradient effects where appropriate
- [ ] Micro-interactions:
  - Button press effects
  - Loading states
  - Success/error states (for future forms)
  - Scroll-triggered animations
- [ ] Bug fixes:
  - Cross-browser compatibility verified
  - All TypeScript errors resolved
  - Console warnings addressed
  - Mobile touch issues fixed
- [ ] Content review:
  - All project descriptions proofread
  - Broken links fixed
  - Image alt tags added
- [ ] Performance final check:
  - All Lighthouse scores > 90
  - No layout shifts
  - Smooth scrolling
- [ ] Documentation:
  - README.md updated with setup instructions
  - Comments added to complex logic
  - Component documentation
- [ ] Final deployment verification

## Blocked by
Issue #012 (Performance Optimization)
